title: Clothing Donation Programs * Youth Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Clothing Donation Programs * Youth Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Disaster/Emergency Issues Infants/Toddlers Men Pregnant Individuals Women Youth Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF THE HARBOR THE DOCK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center. Offers opportunities to receive peer support, complete homework, and meet new people. Individuals have access to the podcast studio, kitchen with snacks, clothing closet, library, social activities like games, arts and crafts, book club, and movie nights. Event calendar is on website. Accepts gently worn clothing donations and books. 395 11th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: Wednesday-Thursday 1pm-7pm Email (503) 325-3426 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE HARBOR THE DOCK
